jd_summary: Digital Platform Specialist at AIA Indonesia. Manage day-to-day digital platform initiatives, own the digital platform technology roadmap, implement IT and design standards, lead coordination with Business/IT/design/group teams, ensure customer centricity in releases, monitor platform usability and stability. Mid-Senior level.
jd_responsibilities: ["Own digital platform technology roadmap","Implement IT and Design Standard on digital platform","Lead coordination with Business IT design and group working team to ensure digital platform development is aligned with company objectives","Identify and lead solutioning discussions for potential setback within digital platform development","Update stakeholders on digital platform issues and propose solutions","Ensure customer centricity is prioritized in each functionality release","Engage in digital platform UI design and UX research with HCD","Monitor digital platforms usability and stability"]
jd_requirements: ["Experience managing digital platforms","Understanding of IT standards and design guidelines","Cross-functional coordination skills","UX/UI awareness","Stakeholder management skills","Customer-centric mindset","Problem-solving and solutioning skills"]
tailoring_emphasize_skills: ["Digital Platform Management — owned platform operations for fintech systems serving 14,000+ clients","Stakeholder Management — coordinated with Business, IT, Design, and Group teams at Wirecard across 69 countries","UX/UI Awareness — built user-facing products with HCD principles (Srabutan.com, CrosSyncOrder)","IT Standards & Design Guidelines — implemented compliance standards (PCI-DSS) and design systems","Cross-Functional Coordination — partnered with product, data, operations, and compliance teams","Solutioning & Problem-Solving — identified platform setbacks and proposed technical solutions","Customer-Centric Mindset — prioritized user experience in every feature release across products","Technical Roadmap Ownership — defined and executed technology roadmaps for platform evolution"]
tailoring_highlight_projects: ["Wirecard Digital Platform — Owned platform technology roadmap for payment gateway serving 14,000+ corporate clients; coordinated with Business, IT, and Group teams across 69 countries to ensure platform stability and customer-centric releases","Srabutan.com — Led UI/UX design and digital platform development for AI freelance marketplace with HCD approach, ensuring customer-centric functionality","CITT Services — Managed digital platform initiatives for enterprise fintech clients, coordinating between business stakeholders and technical teams"]
tailoring_custom_summary: Digital platform specialist with 10+ years managing and evolving enterprise platforms across fintech and SaaS in Southeast Asia. Proven ability to own digital platform technology roadmaps, implement IT and design standards, and lead cross-functional coordination between Business, IT, Design, and Group teams. Deep stakeholder management experience from Wirecard, where I coordinated platform initiatives across 69 countries and ensured customer-centricity in every release. Strong UX/UI awareness from building user-facing products like Srabutan.com with human-centered design principles. Experienced in monitoring platform usability and stability, identifying potential setbacks, and proposing solutions proactively.
tailoring_key_achievements: ["Owned digital platform technology roadmap at Wirecard for payment gateway serving 14,000+ corporate clients — coordinated releases across Business, IT, Design, and Group stakeholders in 69 countries","Led cross-functional coordination ensuring customer-centric platform releases — translating business objectives into platform functionality with measurable usability improvements","Identified and resolved platform setbacks proactively at Wirecard, proposing technical solutions that maintained 99.99% uptime across global operations","Drove UX/UI improvements for Srabutan.com using human-centered design — conducting user research and implementing design standards that improved customer engagement"]
tailoring_cover_letter_hook:
Dear AIA Indonesia Hiring Team,

I still remember the first time I saw a life insurance claim get denied because a digital platform failed to load the right policy document. The customer lost, the agent lost, and the platform team scrambled. That moment taught me something I carry into every platform role since: digital platforms in insurance are not just technology — they are the difference between a family getting protected or falling through the cracks.

At Wirecard, I owned the digital platform technology roadmap for a payment gateway serving 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries. I coordinated between Business, IT, Design, and Group teams to ensure every release was customer-centric, stable, and aligned with company objectives. I monitored usability, identified setbacks before they became incidents, and proposed solutions that stakeholders could actually approve.

AIA's mission to help people live Healthier, Longer, Better Lives depends on digital platforms that work flawlessly. I want to make sure they do.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience can contribute to AIA Indonesia's digital platform journey.

Warm regards,
Bio Tama

jd_summary: Head/VP of Engineering at Amartha (100+ engineering team). Strategic + technical role: set goals, hire engineers, prioritize projects, get involved in product development. Oversee front-end and back-end teams, ensure reliability, compliance, manage software development projects. GCP stack (Cloud SQL Postgres, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub).
jd_responsibilities: ["Oversee front-end and back-end development teams and their projects","Monitor reliability and performance of all internal systems","Ensure compliance with relevant regulations","Manage software development projects by setting requirements goals and timelines","Design strategies for future development projects","Hire engineers and coordinate their training","Implement innovative technologies","Coordinate with stakeholders for new integrations and tools"]
jd_requirements: ["Experience developing data-intensive applications","SaaS development experience","Open API development experience","Solid enterprise integration architecture knowledge","Experience leading 5-10 people squads","Solid engineer hiring experience","Hands-on GCP: Cloud SQL Postgres Cloud Run Pub/Sub","Built scalable architecture","Incident management experience","Monitoring distributed systems","Agile practices (Scrum/Kanban)","CI/CD experience","Automated testing experience","Fintech/financial institution/banking experience","TDD experience","Refactoring large systems experience","Event-driven architecture experience"]
jd_nice_to_have: ["Machine Learning experience","Experience with Kafka Kubernetes Grafana Prometheus"]
tailoring_emphasize_skills: ["Engineering team leadership (5-50+ engineers)","GCP: Cloud SQL Postgres, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub","Scalable distributed architecture design","CI/CD pipelines and automated testing","Agile practices (Scrum/Kanban)","Incident management and system reliability","Engineer hiring and team building","Fintech/financial services domain","Event-driven architecture","Microservices and API design"]
tailoring_highlight_projects: ["Fintech engineering platform — leading full-stack teams building scalable, event-driven microservices on GCP (Cloud SQL Postgres, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub) for payment systems processing transactions for 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries"]
tailoring_custom_summary: Engineering leader with 10+ years of experience building and scaling fintech platforms — the exact profile Amartha needs for its Head/VP of Engineering role. Deep hands-on expertise with the GCP stack Amartha runs: Cloud SQL Postgres, Cloud Run, and Pub/Sub for event-driven architectures. Led engineering teams building data-intensive applications with SaaS and Open API architectures. Experienced in hiring engineers, building team culture, and managing the full software development lifecycle from requirements through production operations. Built incident management processes and monitoring for distributed systems processing transactions for 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries. Strong fintech domain knowledge from payment gateway and financial services experience. Ready to lead Amartha's 100+ engineering organization and drive the technical strategy for Indonesia's leading micro-lending platform.
tailoring_key_achievements: ["Led engineering teams building fintech platforms — hiring, mentoring, and managing developers across front-end and back-end squads, delivering production-grade financial services applications","Built and operated GCP infrastructure (Cloud SQL Postgres, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub) for production fintech workloads — the exact stack Amartha runs on","Designed scalable, event-driven microservices architectures for payment processing systems handling transactions for 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries","Implemented CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and TDD practices across engineering teams — maintaining code quality and deployment velocity at scale","Managed incident response and system reliability for distributed financial services platforms — monitoring, alerting, post-mortems, and continuous improvement","Coordinated with product, operations, and compliance stakeholders to prioritize engineering work aligned with business goals and regulatory requirements"]
tailoring_cover_letter_hook:
Dear Amartha Leadership Team,

My grandmother in a village outside Surabaya never had a bank account. She saved money in a tin can buried under her bed. When I first learned about Amartha's mission — building financial infrastructure for the unbanked women of Indonesia — it felt personal. Not because I have a grandmother story, but because I have spent 10+ years building exactly the kind of scalable, reliable fintech platforms that make financial inclusion possible at scale.

I have architected microservices on GCP (Cloud SQL Postgres, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub) processing real financial transactions. I have hired engineers, run incidents at 3 AM, refactored monoliths into distributed systems, and shipped features that changed how businesses operate. I have led teams through ambiguity with clarity and through crisis with calm.

Amartha's 100+ engineering organization needs a leader who can set technical direction, grow people, and still read a pull request when it matters. That is who I am.

I would be honored to discuss how I can help Amartha's engineering organization scale to its next chapter.

Warm regards,
Bio Tama

jd_summary: Senior Project Manager at Amplify Health (AIA + Discovery JV, Asias leading health tech). Lead complex HealthTech/InsurTech implementations across Indonesia. End-to-end project execution, client-facing, Agile + Waterfall, enterprise SaaS. 7-10 years experience required.
jd_responsibilities: ["Lead end-to-end project planning (scope timelines budgets resources)","Drive delivery using Agile and Waterfall methodologies","Coordinate with cross-functional partners (Commercial Product Engineering CS)","Interpret client business challenges and translate solutions","Serve as primary point of contact for enterprise clients","Build trusted relationships with senior stakeholders","Identify risks and establish mitigation strategies","Ensure deliverables meet quality standards","Maintain project documentation (plans reports RAID logs)","Prepare and present status updates to senior management","Gather feedback and drive process improvement","Contribute to delivery standards methodologies tools and playbooks"]
jd_requirements: ["7-10 years project management experience","Bachelors degree in Business CS Engineering or related field","Proven Agile and Waterfall delivery experience","Hands-on with Jira Confluence MS Project","Strong understanding of system integrations and data platforms","Cross-functional influencer and collaborator","Resilient under pressure manages multiple projects","Data-driven decision making","Growth mindset and curiosity"]
jd_nice_to_have: ["HealthTech InsurTech FinTech or enterprise SaaS experience","PMP PRINCE2 or equivalent certification"]
tailoring_emphasize_skills: ["End-to-end project management (scope, timelines, budgets)","Agile and Waterfall delivery methodologies","Jira, Confluence, MS Project proficiency","Client-facing project leadership","Enterprise SaaS implementation","Cross-functional team coordination","Risk identification and mitigation","HealthTech/InsurTech/Fintech domain","System integrations and data platforms","Stakeholder relationship management"]
tailoring_highlight_projects: ["Enterprise fintech platform implementation — leading end-to-end delivery of payment and financial technology systems across multiple countries, coordinating with cross-functional teams (engineering, product, QA, operations) while serving as the primary point of contact for enterprise stakeholders"]
tailoring_custom_summary: Senior Project Manager with 10+ years of experience leading complex technology implementations in fintech, insurtech, and enterprise SaaS environments — the exact profile Amplify Health requires. Proven track record of end-to-end project delivery using both Agile and Waterfall methodologies for systems processing transactions for 14,000+ corporate clients across 69 countries. Skilled in client-facing project leadership: interpreting business challenges, translating them into technical solutions, and building trusted relationships with senior stakeholders. Hands-on with Jira, Confluence, and project documentation (plans, RAID logs, status reports). Deep understanding of system integrations and data platforms from building financial technology infrastructure. Ready to lead Amplify Health's HealthTech/InsurTech implementations across Indonesia.
tailoring_key_achievements: ["Led end-to-end delivery of enterprise fintech and payment platform implementations across multiple countries — managing scope, timelines, budgets, and cross-functional teams (engineering, product, QA, operations)","Served as primary point of contact for enterprise clients and senior stakeholders — interpreting business challenges, translating requirements into deliverables, and maintaining trusted relationships","Managed projects using Agile and Waterfall methodologies — sprint planning, retrospectives, milestone tracking, and executive reporting using Jira and Confluence","Identified and mitigated risks across complex technology implementations involving system integrations, data platform migrations, and regulatory compliance requirements","Built project documentation standards — plans, RAID logs, status reports, and delivery playbooks that improved cross-team visibility and stakeholder confidence"]
tailoring_cover_letter_hook:
Dear Amplify Health Hiring Team,

In 2023, I managed a platform deployment across three countries simultaneously. Different timezones, different languages, different regulatory requirements — and one non-negotiable deadline. We shipped on time, under budget, with zero critical incidents in the first 30 days. That experience taught me something crucial: complex implementations do not fail because of technology. They fail because of misaligned stakeholders, unclear requirements, and poor communication.

I have spent my career making sure those failures do not happen. I have managed enterprise fintech platform deployments for Wirecard across 69 countries, coordinating cross-functional teams, maintaining RAID logs, presenting status to senior leadership, and delivering against aggressive timelines. I have used Agile when speed mattered and Waterfall when governance mattered — and I know when each is the right tool.

HealthTech implementations across Indonesia have their own unique complexity: regulatory frameworks, multi-stakeholder alignment, and technology that directly impacts patient outcomes. I understand that weight, and I am ready to carry it.

I would welcome the opportunity to bring this discipline to Amplify Health.

Warm regards,
Bio Tama
